release_name: Apogee PR100 HNeRV-LC-v2 adapter exact frontier
evidence_boundaries: This manifest records the current exact local CUDA frontier for the archive/runtime pair, not a leaderboard scrape.
Public PR body scores, comments, and static archive anatomy are external context until exact CUDA replay lands.
Research probes, hidden-gem roadmap items, and unlimited-compute experiments cannot rank without charged bytes, contest-budget inflate, and exact CUDA auth eval.
No private provider URLs, local absolute paths, account metadata, tokens, raw state files, or job transcripts are part of this public manifest.

method_sections.month_long_research: AI-assisted archive forensics, exact eval custody, negative-evidence ledgers, and scoped dispatch control over roughly one month of work.
method_sections.grand_council_skunkworks: Role-assigned AI review generated objections, math checks, threat models, and next experiments; exact CUDA artifacts remained the promotion gate.
method_sections.meta_lagrangian: Every archive stream, decoder, pose atom, mask atom, residual, and wrapper decision is priced by bytes, SegNet, PoseNet, runtime, custody, and compliance risk.
method_sections.hidden_gem_roadmap: HPM1/HPAC parity, native action atoms, HNeRV adapter hardening, scorer-gradient atoms, byte self-compression, and field-policy waterfill remain next-wave research until exact-eval closure.
